reason: Create the MenuActionRegistry class — core abstraction for dynamic menu registration
Register the macOS application menu (OpenCode menu — about, updates, settings, restart, quit) and its action handlers
Register Edit, View, and Window menu sections with action handlers for all webContents and window operations
Register the Help menu — documentation, support, plugin manager, feedback, bug report. All are href-based or command-based, no action handlers needed.
Register the File menu — session management, project management, new window, GitHub PR, close. Mix of command-based items and action items.
Rewrite menu.ts to build from the MenuActionRegistry instead of importing DESKTOP_MENU from @opencode-ai/app/desktop-menu

reason: Replace hardcoded switch with registry-based dispatch. Feature modules register their own action handlers via MenuActionRegistry.on(). This function becomes a thin forwarder preserving backward compat with the IPC path (ipc-window.ts calls it from renderer).
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/desktop/src/main/desktop-menu-actions.ts b/packages/desktop/src/main/desktop-menu-actions.ts
index aa15e05e2..0414c3e20 100644
--- a/packages/desktop/src/main/desktop-menu-actions.ts
+++ b/packages/desktop/src/main/desktop-menu-actions.ts
@@ -1,84 +1,28 @@
-import { BrowserWindow } from "electron"
-import type { DesktopMenuAction } from "@opencode-ai/app/desktop-menu"
-import { createMainWindow, updateTitlebar } from "./windows"
+/**
+ * Desktop menu action dispatcher — thin forwarder to the
+ * MenuActionRegistry.
+ *
+ * Feature modules register their action handlers via
+ *   menuRegistry.on(action, handler)
+ *
+ * in their register*MenuActions() functions. This module keeps
+ * the runDesktopMenuAction() export for backward compatibility
+ * with the ipc-window.ts IPC handler path, which calls it when
+ * the renderer triggers a menu action.
+ *
